title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 28
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students talking about a computer class.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are we still meeting in room twelve for the computer class this afternoon? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Girl: That was the original plan, but the computers in room twelve are being updated. [1]We need to go to the media room instead[/1].. || Boy: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the science room? || Girl: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where will the class take place?
items.explanation: The computer class will take place in the media room.

items.context: You hear two friends preparing for an art lesson.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the art lesson tomorrow yet? I put some coloured pencils in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Man: That was mentioned earlier, but she has enough pencils but needs help making the display. [1]The teacher asked us to bring a bottle of glue[/1].. || Woman: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a paintbrush as well? || Man: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should the student bring?
items.explanation: The student should bring a bottle of glue.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to visit the shopping centre this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Woman: That was our first plan, but the shops will be very busy and the sports hall is closed. We also thought about whether to play basketball. || Man: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Woman: [1]We are going to the photography exhibition instead[/1].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Man: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to go to a photography exhibition.

items.context: You hear two people discussing a doctor's appointment.
items.audio_script: Girl: I need to check the time for the doctor's appointment. I wrote down quarter past three, but I am not sure it is correct. || Boy: It changed this morning because the doctor is seeing an emergency patient first. [1]The appointment is at quarter to four now[/1]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Girl: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Boy: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time is the appointment?
items.explanation: The appointment is at quarter to four.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a camera.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting on with your camera? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Girl: I first thought the lens was scratched, and my brother wondered whether the battery was empty. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [1]The flash does not work when I take photos indoors[/1].. || Boy: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it for the school play this evening. || Girl: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the camera?
items.explanation: The camera flash does not work.

items.context: You hear two friends planning a trip to the shopping centre.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the shopping centre? I thought you were planning to travel by car. || Man: I was, but the car park is full and the cycle path is quick. I also considered going by bus. [1]I will go by bicycle instead[/1].. || Woman: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Man: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Woman: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will the speaker get to the shopping centre?
items.explanation: The speaker will cycle to the shopping centre.

items.context: You hear two people ordering a meal.
items.audio_script: Man: Have you chosen what to order? The queue is moving quickly, and we need to leave soon. || Woman: I nearly chose a cheese pizza, and I also looked at a chicken burger, but I had pizza yesterday and I do not want a burger today. || Man: So what are you going to have? I need to choose mine before we reach the counter. || Woman: [1]I will order the vegetable curry[/1].. It should be enough for me, and then we can find somewhere quiet to sit before we go.
items.question: What will the speaker order?
items.explanation: The speaker orders a vegetable curry.
